next_steps: Serum and urine protein electrophoresis (SPEP/UPEP) with immunofixation
Technetium-99m pyrophosphate (PYP) scintigraphy to evaluate for ATTR amyloidosis
Alpha-galactosidase A enzyme activity and GLA gene sequencing to rule out Fabry disease
NT-proBNP and high-sensitivity troponin levels to quantify cardiac stress
Cardiac biopsy (endomyocardial) with Congo red staining if non-invasive workup is inconclusive
Assessment for systemic features of amyloidosis (e.g., neuropathy screening)
